name: hospitality HR managers in restaurants managing 5-15 employee certifications/month tool
description: For hospitality HR managers in restaurants processing 5-15 employee certifications/month, missed renewals cause compliance penalties. We automate renewal tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and reminders.

problem_solved: Managing timely certification renewals to avoid compliance issues.
features: simple dashboard for overview of certifications
